description:
Return the full JSON schema for one tool exposed by 'pincher'. Pass `tool_name` exactly as listed in the catalog below.

Catalog (15 tools, level=medium):
- adr: Persistent project knowledge store — survives across sessions
- architecture: Codebase orientation in one call — call this first on any unfamiliar project
- changes: Pre-commit safety check: maps your git diff to affected symbols and computes blast radius
- context: PREFERRED for understanding a function: returns the symbol's full source PLUS all functions it directly imports/calls — in one shot
- fetch: Fetch a URL, extract its text content, and store it in the project knowledge base as a searchable Document
- health: Diagnostic report: schema version, index staleness (time since last index), and per-language extraction coverage (parser type + confidence score)
- index: Index a repository
- list: List all indexed projects with stats: name, path, file count, symbol count, edge count, last indexed timestamp
- query: Graph query using Cypher syntax — use when you need structural relationships, not text matches
- schema: Graph schema overview: node kind counts (Function, Class, Method…), edge kind counts (CALLS, IMPORTS…), totals
- search: Find symbols by name or content
- stats: Session savings summary: cumulative tokens used, tokens saved, cost avoided, and call count since the server started
- symbol: Retrieve full source code for one symbol by stable ID using O(1) byte-offset seeking — never re-parses the file
- symbols: Batch retrieve source code for multiple symbols in one call
- trace: Trace call relationships from a function — who calls it (inbound) or what it calls (outbound)

tool_name.description: Name of the underlying tool to fetch the schema for.

name: pincher__get_tool_schema

description: Invoke any of the 15 tools exposed by 'pincher'. Pass `tool_name` (string) and `tool_input` (object matching the tool's schema). Use `pincher__get_tool_schema` first if you need the schema.

tool_input.description: Arguments to pass to the underlying tool.

name: pincher__invoke_tool
